name: python3-minimal
title: python3-minimal
summary: minimal subset of the Python language (default python3 version)
description:
minimal subset of the Python language (default python3 version)
This package contains the interpreter and some essential modules.  It's used
in the boot process for some basic tasks.
See /usr/share/doc/python3.13-minimal/README.Debian for a list of the modules
contained in this package.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use py3clean because minimal subset of the Python language (default python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use py3clean as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `py3clean [-V VERSION] [-p PACKAGE] [DIR_OR_FILE]` as documented upstream for py3clean.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair py3clean with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `py3clean --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
